raw.message: Die StarGames-iOS-App macht Ihr Spiel flexibler! 🚀 Jetzt holen und Slots auf dem iPhone genießen.

hook.summary: Fast-paced reveal of the Book of Ra logo followed by a smiling explorer character and slot gameplay on a mobile device.
hook.visual_action: The game logo flashes with sparks, then zooms out to show a character and a smartphone displaying spinning reels.

scene_flow: Dynamic intro featuring the Book of Ra Deluxe logo amidst fiery sparks.
A smiling explorer character appears behind a smartphone displaying the slot game.
The slot reels spin rapidly, eventually landing on a high-paying line of explorer symbols.
The screen transitions to a dark background featuring the StarGames logo and a 'Download Now' call to action.
on_screen_text: Erlaubt nach Whitelist. Teilnahme ab 18. Glücksspiel kann süchtig machen. Hilfe unter buwei.de. AGB gelten.
audience_proxy: Adult male casino enthusiasts interested in classic slot machine titles.
